description: Style NoteComfy enough for everyday play but cute enough to wear to her best friend's birthday party, choose this frock from doodle if you're looking for a versatile dress which girls will love.Product DetailsPink sleeveless dress with white  piping around the neckline and arm holes, round neckline, graphic print with sequin detail in front and a white band with draw string tie around the hip, Material and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldTumble dry lowUse cool iron
